title: Baby Box Shop Ready to Fill Blue Suitcase Gift Set with Satin Ribbon and Tag, Keepsake Boxes for Baby Shower, Newborn Boys, Small and Medium Sizes
features: Baby Shower Gift Boxes:Celebrate a newborn boy with our unique carry case boxes, made from top-quality materials and featuring a Baby Boy Blue hand-drawn illustration. Sizes: 25x17.5x8.5 cm and 22.8x15.5x7 cm, ideal for baby gifts.

Create Your Own Gift Set: These versatile baby boy keepsake boxes fit small to medium gifts. Each includes a gift tag and ribbon, allowing you to add a personal touch and create a captivating new baby hamper experience.

Value for Money: These 2 splendid baby blue gift boxes are perfect for baby shower gifts, helping new parents cherish items like mittens, first teeth, and shoes. They protect precious mementoes and store keepsakes like cards & toys, adding lasting value.

Making the Right Choice: In the vast landscape of baby hamper and newborn boy gifts selection, making the right choice can be daunting. Baby Box Shop provides a cost-effective and cherished option in this baby keepsake gifts box, new baby boy gifts.

Buy With Confidence: Baby Box Shop ensures each gift box is meticulously packaged in the UK. We address any issues promptly. All soft toys meet EN71 Safety Standards and are suitable from birth, reflecting our commitment to quality.
